mapper.select: SELECT fa.activity_id, fsp.flash_price, fsp.stock_count AS flash_sale_stock, fsp.sold_count, fspe.limit_per_user, fa.end_time FROM flash_sale_activity fa INNER JOIN flash_sale_product fsp ON fa.activity_id = fsp.activity_id LEFT JOIN flash_sale_product_ext fspe ON fsp.product_id = fspe.product_id WHERE fsp.product_id = #{productId} AND fsp.deleted = 0 AND fa.status = 1 -- 进行中 AND fa.start_time <= #{now} AND fa.end_time >= #{now} LIMIT 1
